original: The venus pitcher seed pods stuff your womb to an uncomfortable degree.
The venus pitcher seed pods stuff your womb to the brim.
The venus pitcher seed pods are still present in your womb. Birthing the pods is an arduous task, but some part of you looks forward to the next time you can experience the process.
At least two rounded pods are packed into your womb. A pleasant twinge runs through your body at the thought of passing another.
Your uterine fullness has receded since your initial impregnation at the tentacle-tips of the venus pitchers, but you can still clearly make out a final pod residing deep within your womb.
under the motions of the seed pod
Hints of slime are once again leaking down your [pc.thighs]. Your [pc.vagina
You’ll be laying soon, you’re sure of it. Your [pc.vagina
